description: Located along Chennai's East Coast Road, this campus is known for its focus on maritime and ocean-related education. Established in the early 1990s, it later became a deemed university dedicated to maritime studies and training.
A modern campus in Pune known for its focus on innovation, creativity, and interdisciplinary learning.
A campus known for its academic environment and focus on engineering education, where students engage in collaborative learning and project-based exploration.
Located in Hyderabad, this campus offers students access to an active academic environment along with exposure to the city's growing technology and startup ecosystem.

Situated in the heart of Andhra Pradesh's education hub, Chalapathi Institute of Engineering and Technology (CIET), Guntur, is a place where innovation meets excellence. With a strong academic reputation, advanced infrastructure, and a tech-driven campus culture, CIET is now part of NIAT's mission to shape the next generation of tech leaders.

Malla Reddy Vishwavidyapeeth, a Deemed-to-be University in Hyderabad, is built for the future of tech. With a strong focus on emerging technologies, hands-on learning, and industry-driven academics, the university prepares students to lead in fields like AI, ML, and beyond.
Situated near Vijayawada, this campus provides students with a structured academic environment and an active community focused on learning and skill development.
Located in the coastal city of Visakhapatnam, this campus offers a strong engineering environment with a growing community of students working on technology projects and collaborative learning.
Located in the NCR region, this campus provides students access to a large academic ecosystem and exposure to industries in and around Delhi.
Situated in Bengaluru, this campus combines academic learning with a research-oriented environment focused on advanced studies.

Located in the heart of Maharashtra, Sanjay Ghodawat University offers a modern, tech-enabled campus built for ambitious learners. With a focus on innovation and real-world learning, it's the ideal place to kickstart your tech career.
Located in Jaipur, this campus combines modern infrastructure with a strong academic environment, creating opportunities for students to learn and collaborate across disciplines.
Set in the coastal city of Mangalore, this campus offers a peaceful learning environment along with a growing community of students exploring technology and innovation.
